description: Compare health insurance plans for open enrollment by cleaning the plan data, creating usage scenarios, and calculating total costs. Provide a decision support summary and save the final analysis to /home/ga/Documents/insurance_comparison.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: A user needs help comparing health insurance plans for open enrollment. The data is messy - some premiums are annual vs monthly, one plan is missing its out-of-pocket max. Create three usage scenarios (minimal, moderate, high medical needs), calculate total annual costs for each plan under each scenario, highlight the best options, and indicate which plan is best for different usage patterns.
